name: edbt-skills
description: Depth pack for EDBT's multiple-cycle rolling submission, in-cycle revise-and-resubmit handling, Microsoft CMT submission, Regular / Experiments-&-Analysis / Vision paper shapes, the OpenProceedings.org open-access proceedings, database-systems reproducibility, and the ICDT co-location.

plugins.name: edbt-skills
plugins.description: Twelve EDBT-specific skills for the European Extending Database Technology conference, its multiple-cycle rolling submission model, and its OpenProceedings.org open-access publication path, grounded in the EDBT/ICDT 2026 Tampere calls, the EDBT 2027 cycle deadlines, OpenProceedings.org, and dblp.
